differential_dominated_candidate_audit.discussion: Dominated Differential rows are not automatically bugs because dominance is tested against same-position or same-price-band alternatives, while Differential also values low obviousness and matchday context. The count is still high enough that future Differential scoring should prefer efficient-frontier rows more strongly.
